title: Orchestrator standing-authority audit -- clean continuation proof

sha_binding.verified_source_note: Substantive content commit on the fresh continuation branch claude/utv2-1503-continuation, cut from current main. Carries forward, byte-for-byte, the audit doc already reviewed and PM-approved at a prior PR's final head for this issue, which exceeded the T1 CHANGES_REQUIRED bounce limit before it could merge. All facts in the audit (forbidden-glob list, active consolidated Proof Gate workflow name, cited line numbers in r-level-check.ts/truth-check-lib.ts/apply-branch-protection.sh, docs authority map ownership rows, live branch-protection snapshot, STANDING_GUARDRAILS.md content) were independently re-verified against current main immediately before this commit -- no drift found, no content changes required. Later commits on this branch are restricted to this lane's own manifest and proof/sync paths.

verifier.note: This bundle records mechanical checks only. It is not independent Griff review, t1-approved, or a pm-verdict/v1 owner artifact.

static_proof.tests: pass (node:test suites within pnpm verify; full command exit 0)
